text: do you have the 26 heritage classic in brilliant red? sorry, been really busy

WEB LEAD (ADF)
Inquiry:
Hello, do you have it in stock?
Very interested in thw T10-26 street glide !!
Really? How long is it on hold for

history.body: Quick update - the 2026 CVO Road Glide ST is on hold right now.

text: Hi! Do you have any Street Bob coming in.
Hey Gio.. is there anything in the back that we looked at that would fit my budget?
Do you have anything not posted online yet around my budget?
Can you send me some pics. I wont be able to make it today

history.body: G hope all is well.. did you happen to run those numbers for that bike in the back?

text: Did G run numbers on it?

history.body: Is the bike in the back listed yet?

text: how long would it take to get a 2026 nightster in
Do you the sportster or nightster in stock ? Or something a bit lighter than the low rider
On my way doing my best to be there by 530

Hey Scott this is Mark . I called this morning right after I got your message and whoever answered the phone said they would get a message to you to call me back. I'm not sure if you just got busy or if you didn't get the message. I thought long and hard about the test ride and I don't think I liked the new bike enough to buy it. I'm now looking for an older street glide prior to the current fairing and handlebar controls. I'm assuming I need to find a 2022 or older. If you have one that has the black trim instead of chrome please let me know. If you have any questions please feel free to call me.
